feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Re: PGR not happening while doing the sale return
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

I am doing MTO Process in ECC System.I have done PGI/Billing, Now i am creating Return w.r.t to the Billing i have created the Return Sales Orders but while doing PGR It is showing me one error, attaching the screenshot as well.

Kindly look upon it and help me in this. I have seen various post posted in community but it not solve by issue

Pardeep

entry.title: Purpose code mapped in DTAZV for Foreign payment from Germany to China
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

The client (Germany) is going to make a payment to the vendor who is located in China, using the DTAZV format, but the banker rejected the payment file after done F110 because the relevant purpose codes are not created for service and trading goods, so according to bank instructions, I created two purpose codes, one for service (STRX) and another for trade in goods (GODX), in the system, which are linked to country grouping code 28 (China). Here is how the system will pick the purpose code while the F110 runs, and are there any configuration steps missing? Could anyone tell me how to fix this issue?

Best Regards,

Thilak Chagantipati,

entry.title: Is MB5B used in S4 Hana?
entry.content:
Hello,

  Can you tell me if Tcode MB5B was discontinued in S4 Hana.  My company did an upgrade last year and now the data is not updating since the upgrade?  I checked the Tcode comparisions from SAP to S4 Hana and I didn't find MB5B listed as a different Tcode in S4 Hana.  The IT group is telling me it is no longer used in S4 Hana.  Any help is appreciated.

Thank you

Sean

entry.title: Unable to create delivery in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

i have created a sales order in public cloud of three line item, when i am trying to create a delivery only one line item is appearing in the delivery screen. and for rest two line item i am getting below error. please guide me with the solution.

entry.title: Criação de PO com 1 linha no valor de 1 Bilhão
entry.content:
Bom dia,

Temos a necessidade de criar uma PO de materiais com apenas 1 linha no valor de 1 bilhão, ocorre que há uma limitação no campo valor de 9+2 dígitos/decimais.
Já me orientaram a quebrar o valor deste único material em várias linhas mas, isso não seria ideal para o controle de inventário.

Quais opções eu teria neste caso?

Obrigada,

Vanessa.

entry.title: Is there any way to change the VBRK-VBELN field for an ID that is not being used yet?
entry.content:
As a result of a problem in the configuration of the ranges, the invoice was created with id 249200142R, when in reality it should have been id 259200000R, which has not been used before in the system. Is there any way we can make this change? In other words: Is there any way to change the VRBK-VBELN field for an identification that is not being used and that is prior to the corresponding one that would correspond to this period of the year? If this is not possible, what other solution could be proposed to the client? Any help will be greatly appreciated

Thank you very much in advance. Kind regards

entry.title: Why Are BRF+ Objects Inactive After Transporting from Development to Quality in SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Introduction

Business Rule Framework Plus (BRF+) is a powerful tool in SAP S/4HANA for defining business rules and decision logic. However, when transporting BRF+ applications across different system landscapes, several challenges can arise. I am currently facing a transport issue when moving BRF+ applications for Quotation and another determination output from the Development system to Quality and would appreciate any input from the SAP Community.

Issue Details

Step 1: Import the Standard BRF+ XML File

  • Imported the standard BRF+ XML file for Quotation and another determination output into the Development system.

  • Verified that all objects (Functions, Rules, Expressions, etc.) were correctly imported.

Step 2: Activation and Transport Capture

  • Activated all the imported objects successfully in the Development system.

  • Ensured that all objects were captured in a transport request using SE09.

Step 3: Transport to Quality System

  • Transported the BRF+ application from Development to Quality.

  • However, after import, all objects in the Quality system appear inactive.

Step 4: Re-Capturing and Re-Transporting

  • Re-activated the objects in the Development system.

  • Created a new transport request with the activated objects.

  • Re-transported it to Quality, but the issue persists.

Request for Input

Has anyone encountered a similar issue where BRF+ objects become inactive in the target system after transport? Any insights on:

  • Ensuring BRF+ objects retain their active status post-transport?

  • Best practices for BRF+ transport and activation?

  • Any missing configurations that could cause this behaviour?

Any guidance or solutions from the SAP Community would be greatly appreciated. Looking forward to your expert suggestions!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Help Us Decorate Our SAP Team Space – Poster Ideas Wanted!
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We're looking to spruce up our office corridors with some high-quality SAP content! I recently came across this great SAP poster:
https://www.sap.com/germany/documents/2025/02/1288d9d0-f57e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

Does anyone know where to find more similar posters – preferably large, high-resolution versions that work well for printing and display? We'd love to showcase more of what makes SAP awesome on our walls.

Thanks in advance for any tips or links!

Best,
Henric

entry.title: How long to get a learning journey code error be fixed by asking https://support.learning.sap.com
entry.content:
I have reported a code error in one of the free SAP Learning Journeys (*) via https://support.learning.sap.com > Contact Us, two months ago, but still no answer. Note that I got the information 90 minutes after posting that my report was forwarded "to the relevant team as they are more efficient and reliable when it comes to this kind of matter" (i.e. a code error).

How long should I wait, i.e. what is your experience?

Thank you.

Sandra

(*) Specifically: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/learn-the-basics-of-abap-programming-on-sap-btp

entry.title: PPF- Autopack
entry.content: I have a task which is, PPF: Pack for Inbound delivery, I have to create a custom action definition so as to implement the method for autopack. I have found a standard method for autopack, but I'm facing issue in implementing that in the action definition. Does anyone know how to implement it in the action definition?

entry.title: The partial write-off of the fixed asset with quantity, error FAA_Post081
entry.content: The original cost of the fixed asset in the evaluation area 01 is 0, and there are revaluation amounts. When partially transferring or writing off the fixed asset with quantity, the error FAA_Post081 occurs. If the transaction is carried out without specifying the quantity (using percentages or amounts), it is processed successfully. However, the requirement is for the quantity to be included in the journal entry. Could you please advise how to achieve this?

entry.title: Can somene help me how to deactivate SAP GTS to the PO,I am not able to post GR/GI
entry.content:
Hi GTS Consultants,

I tried creating PO in training server ,But when I save I got error in ME21N screen - legal control custs prod. mast. required,Ican save the PO with blocked status, but when I try to post Goods Receipt system is not allowing me to post and giving below message -

Customs document 4500000375 is technical incomplete (SAP GTS)

Message No. /SAPSLL/PLUGINR3076

Please let me know where to deactivate SAP GTS to my PO Document type or my Comp Code/Plant or at client level.

@Lakshmipathi Any inputs on this ?

entry.title: Quick way of finding successor / released objects in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Quick steps to finding out the released / successor Objects in S/4 HANA 

1. Using SAP's Cloudification Repository Viewer github link

https://sap.github.io/abap-atc-cr-cv-s4hc/?version=objectReleaseInfo_PCE2023_1.json&q=mara

refer detailed blog by- @aoyang 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/s-4-hana-cloudification-guide-for-developer-navigating-to-released-apis/ba-p/13950875

2. Alternate way to finding successor object is using backend table view ARS_W_API_SCCSSR : API Successor Data of Deprecated/Decommissioned APIs where SubObjectName is the search Object. User should have access to backend S/4 HANA system. This table stores only deprecated api's also refer other supporting table ARS_W_API_STATE for release state info.

entry.title: how to send Quality Notification to supplier Via email in S4hana public cloud by using OPD setup
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

business have requirement to send Q notification to supplier via email by using OPD setup, Email Recipients should pick from supplier master data, instead of default email address. For example, it could be read from a master data address or from a document address. Output Control should use this email address always as TO address. how i can achieve this in S4hana public cloud. your help will really appreciated. 

 

Thanks,

Kalidas

entry.title: If BAS is standard edition, can't I use joule Copliot in my build code?
Please provide details how to create Purchase info record automatically?
SAP Crystal Reports 2020 Patch 1 Version 14.3.0.3569 CR Developer software (Log4j)
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently using SAP Crystal Reports 2020 Patch 1 Version 14.3.0.3569 CR Developer software

I did a vulnerability scan and I get  a Vulnerability: Remote code execution vulnerability in Apache Commons Text - CVE-2022-42889. How do i remediate this issue?

entry.title: Can I add custom tab into WBS Element for transaction CJ91/CJ92 in S4 Hana?
entry.content:
Please suggest, how to add custom tab into WBS Element for transaction CJ91/CJ92 in SAP S/4HANA 2023?

or let me know if it is feasible in SAP S/4HANA 2023?

as per my knowledge Fiori approach, the recommended and upgrade-safe method to add a custom tab or fields to the WBS Element (CJ93 equivalent) is through In-App

Extensibility using the "Custom Fields and Logic "Fiori app.

For GUI Screen, Classical enhancement like CNEX007 is still required.

and in the Enhancement CNEX007. FM - EXIT_SAPLCJWB_001 is not available in the S/4HANA 2023.

Also, I have checked the program behind CJ92 is SAPLCJSS. but couldn't find screen exists.

I have attached the screen short and marked with yellow box where need to add custom tab with custom fields. Please suggest the solution. 

Thanks,

Priyanka Soni

entry.title: Improve Q&A to show "SAP managed tags" and "labels" all together?
entry.content:
When I look at a question, the SAP Managed Tags are not sufficient to understand the scope of the question, they are too much general. The labels bring more value but are displayed at the end of the question. Is it possible to put them up, right below the SAP Managed Tags?

e.g. In AMDP, is it possible to use a SEQUENCE object? ... - SAP Community

this is the current way to show the question

I'd like to see "SAP managed tags" and "labels" all together:

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: How can I insert a video from https://video.sap.com into my blog?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to create a blog and insert a video from https://video.sap.com into it. 
URL: https://video.sap.com/media/t/1_0wvg5tt7

I run into an issue and an error message is displayed:

Is it possible to include a video from https://video.sap.com?

If not, which platform should be used instead? Youtube?

Thanks for your answer.
